title: eragrostis castellaneana
intro: Eragrostis castellaneana, also known as Castellane grass, is a type of grass native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis castellaneana include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. It can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
